security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Forgexalith is a full Personal Knowledge Management engine written in Rust. Standalone desktop app with notes, backlinks, graph view, wikilinks, and full-text search.
